description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a beige stucco exterior and a blue-gray gabled roof featuring a diamond shingle pattern. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence enclosing a grassy yard, with a large pine tree and a blossoming cherry tree on either side. There are several rectangular windows with blue shutters, one of which is open, and a simple wooden door at the front. The yard contains a brown horse and a chicken, adding a rural touch to the otherwise urban setting. The house appears compact and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a straightforward, practical design.
description: A compact beige house with a blue-gray gabled roof, blue-shuttered windows, and a fenced grassy yard featuring a pine tree, cherry tree, horse, and chicken.
description_view_0: Side view showing two blue-shuttered windows, one open, with a horse's head visible at the left and a chicken in the grass near the fence.
description_view_1: End view with the gabled roof, a centered window, and both the cherry and pine trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two windows, the full horse visible inside the fenced yard, and both trees in the background.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entry door, circular attic window, and both trees; the horse and chicken are visible near the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch or steps, flanked by windows and a circular attic window above.
